behavior: Appears at thresholds offering fair bargains, but each deal subtly redefines what the victim considers 'fair' until they willingly trade away everything
A mass of fused bodies that only hunts those who have been forgotten by everyone they once knew—it can sense the absence of being remembered
Stitches sleeping victims into their own nightmares using thread spun from regret; victims wake paralyzed, living their worst memories on loop
Manifests near anyone who survived when others died in their place; doesn't attack, just follows—until the survivor is alone
A faceless merchant that appears in moments of desperation, trades exactly what you need for 'something you won't miss yet'
Mimics the voice of a loved one calling from just out of sight, leading victims in circles until exhaustion—it feeds on the hope that precedes despair
Hunts exclusively those who abandoned creative works; appears as a shifting mass of half-formed shapes, demanding completion or consumption
Tracks oath-makers obsessively but never harms them—instead kills everyone the oath-breaker loves while forcing them to watch
Infests a community as a shared delusion of prosperity; victims fatten and celebrate while slowly being digested from within over months
Appears as a helpful stranger who saves lives unsolicited, then returns years later to collect—the saved must now save it, no matter the cost
